mission: Separate acceptance-gate authority from implementation and run a bounded repair loop with one branch writer.

architect.owns: acceptance contract and immutable gate hash

steps.action: Architect writes deterministic acceptance criteria and validation commands before builder mutation.
Hash the gate; builder may not weaken, replace, skip, or reinterpret it.
Builder changes only owned files on the assigned branch.
Validator runs the frozen gate and records command, exit, duration, result, and minimized findings.
Builder repairs only actionable failures while the same gate and scope remain valid.
Stop on pass, exhausted bounds, no progress, changed assumptions, unsafe state, or contradictory evidence.
Emit validation ledger, changed files, commit evidence, unresolved failures, proof ceiling, and one next command.

proofCeiling: Bounded validation-loop contract only; no Pi runtime, provider response, implementation success, or live-target proof.
